brand_identity.name: Artham Aesthetique
brand_identity.motion_style: Calm motion, opacity + translate + blur only, 700-1200ms ease-out cubic. NO bounce, neon, particles, or WebGL.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous whitespace. Use p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32.

header.description: Innovative header with utility strip. Glassmorphism nav on scroll (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#efdfc8]/70) with hairline gold border (border-b border-[#b8894a]).
header.mega_menu: 6 category columns layout with a featured card for Treatments.

hero.description: Full-bleed muted autoplay looping video with soft armadillo (#483f37) gradient overlay (max 40-50% opacity). Text overlaid.

sticky_mobile_bar.description: Sticky bottom action bar on mobile with Call, WhatsApp, and Book actions.

booking_flow.description: 3-step stepper (Concern → Date/Time → Details). Use gold (#b8894a) for the progress indicator.

chatbot.description: Floating lotus launcher with guided intents panel.

footer.description: Armadillo background (#483f37), arabian-white text (#efdfc8), gold headings (#b8894a). 4-column layout including newsletter.

media_urls.logo: Wait for user to provide the literal file path for the Lotus Logo (with Devanagari) they uploaded. Do not use generic text if asset exists.
media_urls.doctor_portrait: placeholder (Wait for user to provide, or use an elegant Unsplash portrait placeholder temporarily)

treatment_images.description: Cosmetic dropper bottles for product feature
Minimalist spa products with lush green leaves
Soft dermatology visual, woman touching face

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT use Shadcn standard UI uncustomized. Re-style inputs, cards, and accordions to fit the Aesop x Aman aesthetic (no borders, or only hairline gold borders).
CRITICAL: Ensure EVERY single interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
Add custom Tailwind classes in the config for these exact colors: burma-teak (#844d28), arabian-white (#efdfc8), armadillo (#483f37), coronation-gold (#b8894a), summer-peach (#f5e6d0).
Set up Framer Motion or Tailwind transitions exactly as requested (700-1200ms ease-out cubic). Only opacity, translate, and blur. NO bounces.
Ensure components are pure .jsx/.js and NOT .tsx.
Backgrounds MUST rotate exactly as instructed: arabian-white -> summer-peach -> armadillo -> burma-teak.
Implement mobile-first responsive behaviors, especially the sticky mobile bottom bar and chatbot.
